title: Justice Aruna Jagadeesan visits Karur stampede site to begin probe
summary: Justice Aruna Jagadeesan, heading the one-member commission set up by the Tamil Nadu government, visited the Karur rally stampede site to formally begin her inquiry into the tragedy.

title: TVK General Secretary N. Anand booked in connection with Karur stampede
summary: TVK General Secretary N. Anand has been booked by Karur police in connection with the stampede at the party's rally. Several party functionaries are also under questioning.

title: PM and CM Vijay announce ex-gratia for Karur stampede victims
summary: The Prime Minister has announced an ex-gratia payment for the families of those killed in the Karur stampede. TVK chief and CM Vijay has separately announced ₹20 lakh each for the bereaved families.

title: Udhayanidhi and EPS visit Karur Government Hospital, meet injured
summary: Deputy CM Udhayanidhi Stalin and LoP Edappadi K. Palaniswami separately visited Karur Government Hospital to meet those injured in the stampede and assured strict preventive measures.

title: Karur handloom exporters briefed on India's free trade agreements
summary: The Textile Export Facilitation Centre organised a training session for Karur handloom exporters on maximising export potential through India's 17 free trade agreements, inaugurated by Customs Commissioner Bharat Prakash.

title: DVAC arrests RTO in Karur in disproportionate assets case
summary: DVAC officials have arrested the Karur RTO in a disproportionate assets case after simultaneous searches at multiple locations linked to the officer.

title: DMK wins two seats in Karur district; AIADMK takes Karur main
summary: DMK has won two assembly seats in Karur district in the 2026 elections, while AIADMK's MR Vijayabhaskar has won the Karur main constituency in a closely watched contest.
